subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! Through Thy power Thou hast brought forth a new creation and fashioned and ordained a mighty age [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی قد انشأت بقدرتک خلقاً جدیداً و برأت و احدثت کوراً شدیداً
subcodes.subjects: @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion
